title: Enhanced Shulkers
description: This resource pack changes the texture of shulkers
body:
![shulker](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b72fa59b872da72524b46f8b92b31edb37136bcb.jpeg)

### What does this resource pack do?
This resource pack changes the texture of the shulker, making it fresher and better.

All shulker color variants have been changed.
![shulkers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/52eef057d8bdec1abdd4cf6fd94f0f16d618b8dc.png)

For compatibility with Fresh Animations, use the [Enhanced Shulkers x Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/enhanced-shulkers-x-fresh-animations) add-on.
